title: Crash in "INSERT INTO ... SELECT" when "PRAGMA count_changes=1" is configured
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO ... SELECT with PRAGMA count_changes=1
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) SELECT 'test1', 1.5 UNION SELECT 'test2', NULL;
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) SELECT 'test3', CAST('3.14' AS REAL) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE name='test3');
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) SELECT 'test4', 2.71828 WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) < 5;
